name: diag-edge-inspect
description: Diagnostic — inspect the edge layer's internal state to see why edges aren't visible.

commands: (async () => { await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1200)); const r = (window).__qualiaRenderer || null; const sm = r?.getSceneManager?.(); const em = sm?.edgeMesh; const mat = em?.lineSegments?.material; const geom = em?.lineSegments?.geometry; const edges = sm?._store?.getActiveEdges?.() || []; const positions = sm?._store?.getActivePositions?.() || {}; return { hasRenderer: !!r, hasSceneManager: !!sm, hasEdgeMesh: !!em, globalShape: em?.globalShape, count: em?.count, materialOpacity: mat?.opacity, materialLineWidth: mat?.linewidth, materialResolution: mat?.resolution?.toArray?.(), geomInstanceCount: geom?.instanceCount, lineSegmentsVisible: em?.lineSegments?.visible, edgeArrayLength: edges.length, firstEdge: edges[0], positionsCount: Object.keys(positions).length }; })()
